accept.reason: flutter, node, and firebase genuinely apply here but their pack fingerprints look for a repo-root pubspec.yaml / package.json / firebase.json, while this monorepo nests each in its own project root — app/, firebase/functions/, and firebase/ (a Firebase project root is the directory that holds firebase.json, not necessarily the repo root) — so detect() can't see them and the declaration is deliberately ahead of the root-only fingerprint. (executable-requirements needs no acceptance: it fingerprint-matches on dev/requirements/requirements.md.)
